LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY IS A MEMBER OF THE GOVERNMENT OVERSIGHT AND COMPLEX TRANSACTION TEAM AND IS NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE DISCLOSURE SHOULD APPEAR AT THE REGISTER OF ACTION AND THE CLERK TO NOTIFY ALL PARTIES IN THE CASE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BEVERLY ALTMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER DESIGNATING DOE 11 IN HER COMPLAINT TO BE THYSSEN KRUPP ELEVATOR CORPORATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
